title: Melon Golem
description: This mod adds Melon Golem from Minecraft Earth to Java!!
body:
### **Introduction**
**Melon Golem** brings the beloved Melon Golem from **Minecraft Earth** into the main game, giving players a charming and functional new ally. This friendly mob shoots **melon projectiles** at enemies, offering both defense and nostalgia. Whether you're looking for a unique farm guardian, **a decorative companion**, or just a fun addition to your world, the Melon Golem delivers!

![Attack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b43723f9e2f2f2abb1134d7cb027cc6d8759e66b.gif)

### Main Features:
- **Carved Melon Block:** Crafted by using shears on a regular melon, adding a unique decorative block to the game.
- **Melon Golem Summoning:** Place the Curved Melon Block on two snow blocks to summon your custom Melon Golem.
- **Custom Ranged Attack:** The Melon Golem is a custom mob that shoots melon projectiles at enemies.
### Use Cases:
- **Defensive Companion:** Summon the Melon Golem to protect your base from hostile mobs, as it will automatically attack enemies with its melon projectiles.
- **Decorative Builds:** Use the Curved Melon Block in creative constructions—perfect for market stalls, tropical-themed builds, or melon farms.
